final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing logo for a tech-lifestyle content creator covering EVs, digital gadgets, and daily essentials.

Style/medium: clean flat vector logo, minimalist and universally legible, inspired by Dieter Rams functional design
Subject: abstract geometric mark suggesting connectivity and modern living (intersecting lines or subtle circuit-inspired shapes), balanced with clear wordmark space
Composition: centered mark with generous padding, scalable from favicon to banner
Color palette: neutral slate gray as primary, electric blue as accent, white background — avoids culturally sensitive colors
Constraints: must read clearly at 32x32 avatar size; monochrome version must work without color; avoid symbols with religious, political, or regional associations
Avoid: red/green combinations (colorblind issues); religious symbols; flags; hand gestures; animal totems; complex gradients; photorealistic elements; text in any specific language
